arts.sum: One thing is for sure: home security must be improved and valuable items hidden more…creatively, so as to curb the frequency of robberies. Bild and BFW can neither confirm nor deny if rice cookers or a truck full of chocolates were included in those “valuables”, nor can we say that a doppelganger is purportedly responsible for these crimes.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel responds to England critics and reveals Harry Kane captaincy plans
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel, who will officially start as England boss on January 1, was handed a dream passport to the 2026 World Cup after being put in a qualifying Group with Serbia, Albania, Latvia and Andorra

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl still wants Jonathan Tah...should the club sign him for next season?; Bundesliga predictions; Throwing it back to Hot Hot Heat; and MORE!
arts.sum: According to Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk (in his work for CaughtOffside via @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl is still extremely interested in Bayer Leverkusen center-back Jonathan Tah, who has also been linked to FC Barcelona and Real Madrid : Bayern Munich will travel to Mainz 05 for a Bundesliga tilt where head coach Vincent Kompany will have to continue to work through the mini-injury crisis that is going on at the moment.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich and PSG battling for Brighton goalkeeper Bart Verbruggen
arts.sum: In October, we reported on it in our Transfer Update show and now it’s confirmed: Bart #Verbruggen from @OfficialBHAFC is a goalkeeper FC Bayern are monitoring closely in case the plan with Manuel Neuer and Alexander Nübel does not work out. Bayern Munich is reported to be actively looking for a replacement goalkeeper for Manuel Neuer with his current crop of deputies — Sven Ulreich, Alexander Nübel, and Daniel Peretz — perhaps all not on the level required at Bayern.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane record under threat as Mo Salah matches Steven Gerrard's Liverpool feat
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has starred for Liverpool this season and has now been named the Premier League's Player of the Month for November after a stellar period for the Reds

arts.ttl: The rise of Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala—Part 5: Lasagna left a lasting impression
arts.sum: For all of those who recognize this reference, it was during the last day of the 2005/06 Premier League season when several Spurs players went down with a stomach bug after eating “ dodgy lasagne “ before their game against West Ham United. Musiala had to eat the same food for a period of time to the point that he got desensitized from it: “I can’t even smell it anymore.

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI vs Mainz
arts.sum: After their 5-1 win against Shakhtar Donetsk in midweek, Bayern Munich travel to Mainz to face Bo Henriksen’s side at the MEWA Arena. Bayern will once again be without Harry…

arts.ttl: Liverpool in race for Bayern's Davies - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are in the hunt to sign Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies, Manchester City are set to be busy in January, while Girona's Miguel Gutierrez is on Manchester United's radar.

arts.ttl: Mainz vs Bayern München preview: Formidable visitors look to repeat Pokal antics
arts.sum: Bundesliga leaders Bayern München aim to strengthen their grip on the top spot as they travel to Mewa Arena on Saturday to face Mainz in their 14th league match of the 2024-25 season

arts.ttl: Report: No decision on deadline for Alphonso Davies, but things are looking good for Bayern Munich to get deal done
arts.sum: Bayern and Alphonso Davies’ agents have been in regular contact in recent months, including via a video call last week. Things have certainly take a turn for the better in recent weeks between Davies and Bayern Munich.
